acquisition_scope: Immutable arXiv v1 paper plus the paper-linked project site, current GitHub code revision, and current Hugging Face dataset revision. This is source acquisition and extraction, not a deep review or release-conformance audit.

paper.title: AgentAbstain: Do LLM Agents Know When Not to Act?

code_release.archive_integrity: unzip -t reported no errors; 143 archive entries and 1,382,603 uncompressed bytes

dataset_release.acquisition_note: The immutable tasks.jsonl and README were acquired directly at the recorded Hugging Face revision. The API manifest records the native task directories and 42 environment source trees, but those dataset files were not duplicated locally because the pinned code archive plus canonical JSONL provide the compact reviewer source pack. Reviewers needing native initial-state files should fetch the recorded immutable dataset revision.

verification.paper_extraction: Non-empty extraction inspected at the abstract/introduction, metric and denominator definitions, full eight-scenario taxonomy, release/pipeline appendices, extended related work, and final page. The extraction reaches page 56 and is coherent; mathematical layout is imperfect, so PDF/HTML remain authoritative for equations and figures.
verification.dataset: All 526 non-empty JSONL lines parsed as JSON. There are exactly 263 unique pair_id values, each represented twice, and eight category values. execution_dag is populated on 263 act rows and abstention_trigger on 263 abstain rows.
verification.withdrawal_check: The immutable v1 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
verification.claim_boundary: No deep review, benchmark validity conclusion, causal claim, calibrated-safety claim, professional-validity claim, or readiness claim is made by this record. The code and dataset revisions postdate arXiv v1 by several days and are pinned as acquisition-time releases, not asserted to be the exact paper-time artifacts.
